name: AlienVault OTX - threat pulses (CTI)
description: Pulls threat 'pulses' from AlienVault OTX / LevelBlue Open Threat Exchange and maps each to a normalized XORCISM intel item -> XTHREAT.INTELEXCHANGE (the threat graph + ATT&CK coverage heatmap). Each pulse carries indicators (IPs, domains, hostnames, URLs, file hashes, CVEs), MITRE ATT&CK technique ids, adversary, malware families, targeted industries/countries and tags. The named CTI source XORCISM was missing alongside MISP / OpenCTI / abuse.ch / VirusTotal / GreyNoise / Shodan. Modes: live (your subscribed pulses via the OTX API key), file (an exported pulses JSON), or demo. Read-only. Config: OTX_API_KEY (or pass api_key).

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.help: OTX API key (overrides OTX_API_KEY) for live /pulses/subscribed

parameters.name: modified_since
parameters.help: ISO timestamp - only pulses modified since (live; default: all subscribed)

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path to an exported OTX pulses JSON ({"results":[...]} or an array). A demo sample is used if omitted and no API key is set.
